ps1.6:1.1.pli: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇasampayutte katinaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:1.2.pli: Khattiyamahāsālānaṁ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ gahapatimahāsālānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ ñāṇasampayutte katinaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:1.3.pli: Rūpāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ katinaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:1.4.pli: Arūpāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ katinaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:2.1.pli: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇasampayutte aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:2.2.pli: Khattiyamahāsālānaṁ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ gahapatimahāsālānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ ñāṇasampayutte aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:2.3.pli: Rūpāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:2.4.pli: Arūpāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:3.1.pli: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇasampayutte katamesaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:4.1.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcakkhandhā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.2.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro mahābhūtā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.3.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo jīvitasaṅkhārā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.4.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca rūpañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.5.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.6.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro khandhā arūpino sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.7.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcindriyāni sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.8.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo hetū sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.9.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca viññāṇañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.10.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.11.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime aṭṭhavīsati dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:4.12.pli: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇasampayutte imesaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:5.1.pli: Khattiyamahāsālānaṁ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ gahapatimahāsālānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ ñāṇasampayutte katamesaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:6.1.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcakkhandhā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.2.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro mahābhūtā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.4.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca rūpañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.5.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.6.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro khandhā arūpino sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.7.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcindriyāni sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.8.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo hetū sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.9.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca viññāṇañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.10.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.11.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime aṭṭhavīsati dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:6.12.pli: Khattiyamahāsālānaṁ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ gahapatimahāsālānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ ñāṇasampayutte imesaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:7.1.pli: Rūpāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ katamesaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:7.3.pli: rūpāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ imesaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:8.1.pli: Arūpāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ katamesaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:9.1.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro khandhā arūpino sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:9.2.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcindriyāni sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:9.3.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo hetū sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:9.4.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca viññāṇañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:9.5.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:9.6.pli: Arūpāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ imesaṁ aṭṭhannaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:10.1.pli: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇavippayutte katinaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:10.2.pli: Khattiyamahāsālānaṁ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ gahapatimahāsālānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ ñāṇavippayutte katinaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:11.1.pli: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇavippayutte channaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:11.2.pli: Khattiyamahāsālānaṁ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ gahapatimahāsālānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ ñāṇavippayutte channaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:12.1.pli: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇavippayutte katamesaṁ channaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:13.1.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcakkhandhā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.2.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro mahābhūtā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.3.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo jīvitasaṅkhārā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.4.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca rūpañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.5.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.6.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro khandhā arūpino sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.7.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāri indriyāni sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.8.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe dve hetū sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.9.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca viññāṇañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.10.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime dvādasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.11.pli: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime chabbīsati dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

ps1.6:13.12.pli: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇavippayutte imesaṁ channaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti.

ps1.6:14.1.pli: Khattiyamahāsālānaṁ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ gahapatimahāsālānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ ñāṇavippayutte katamesaṁ channaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hoti?

ps1.6:14.6.pli: khattiyamahāsālānaṁ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ gahapatimahāsālānaṁ kāmāvacarānaṁ devānaṁ ñāṇavippayutte imesaṁ channaṁ hetūnaṁ paccayā upapatti hotī”ti.

ps1.7:4.1.pli: Ahosi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, ahosi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:4.2.pli: Ahosi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, nāhosi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:4.3.pli: Ahosi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, atthi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:4.4.pli: Ahosi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, natthi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:4.5.pli: Ahosi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:4.6.pli: Ahosi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:5.1.pli: Atthi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, atthi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:5.2.pli: Atthi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, natthi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:5.3.pli: Atthi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:5.4.pli: Atthi kusalaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:6.1.pli: Bhavissati kusalaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:6.2.pli: Bhavissati kusalaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:7.1.pli: Ahosi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, ahosi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:7.2.pli: Ahosi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, nāhosi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:7.3.pli: Ahosi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, atthi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:7.4.pli: Ahosi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, natthi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:7.5.pli: Ahosi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:7.6.pli: Ahosi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:8.1.pli: Atthi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, atthi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:8.2.pli: Atthi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, natthi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:8.3.pli: Atthi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:8.4.pli: Atthi akusalaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:9.1.pli: Bhavissati akusalaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:9.2.pli: Bhavissati akusalaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:10.8.pli: ahosi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, ahosi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:10.9.pli: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, nāhosi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:10.10.pli: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, atthi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:10.11.pli: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, natthi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:10.12.pli: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:10.13.pli: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:11.1.pli: Atthi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, atthi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:11.2.pli: Atthi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, natthi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:11.3.pli: Atthi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:11.4.pli: Atthi dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:12.1.pli: Bhavissati dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.

ps1.7:12.2.pli: Bhavissati dukkhavipākaṁ kammaṁ, na bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipākoti.

ps1.8:1.4.pli: Anicce, bhikkhave, niccanti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso.

ps1.8:1.5.pli: Dukkhe, bhikkhave, sukhanti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso.

ps1.8:1.6.pli: Anattani, bhikkhave, attāti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso.

ps1.8:1.7.pli: Asubhe, bhikkhave, subhanti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso.

ps1.8:1.8.pli: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro saññāvipallāsā cittavipallāsā diṭṭhivipallāsā.

ps1.8:2.3.pli: Anicce, bhikkhave, aniccanti nasaññāvipallāso nacittavipallāso nadiṭṭhivipallāso.

ps1.8:2.4.pli: Dukkhe, bhikkhave, dukkhanti nasaññāvipallāso nacittavipallāso nadiṭṭhivipallāso.

ps1.8:2.5.pli: Anattani, bhikkhave, anattāti nasaññāvipallāso nacittavipallāso nadiṭṭhivipallāso.

ps1.8:2.6.pli: Asubhe, bhikkhave, asubhanti nasaññāvipallāso nacittavipallāso nadiṭṭhivipallāso.

ps1.8:2.7.pli: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro nasaññāvipallāsā nacittavipallāsā nadiṭṭhivipallāsā”ti.

ps1.8:8.1.pli: Ime cattāro vipallāsā diṭṭhisampannassa puggalassa pahīnā, appahīnāti.

ps1.8:8.3.pli: Anicce niccanti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso pahīno.

ps1.8:8.4.pli: Dukkhe sukhanti saññā uppajjati, cittaṁ uppajjati, diṭṭhivipallāso pahīno.

ps1.8:8.5.pli: Anattani attāti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso pahīno.

ps1.8:8.6.pli: Asubhe subhanti saññā uppajjati, cittaṁ uppajjati, diṭṭhivipallāso pahīno.

ps1.8:8.8.pli: Dvīsu vatthūsu dve vipallāsā pahīnā, cattāro vipallāsā appahīnā.

ps1.8:8.9.pli: Catūsu vatthūsu aṭṭha vipallāsā pahīnā, cattāro vipallāsā appahīnāti.

ps1.9:1.2.pli: Sotāpattimaggakkhaṇe dassanaṭṭhena sammādiṭṭhi micchādiṭṭhiyā pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, sahajātānaṁ dhammānaṁ upatthambhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, kilesānaṁ pariyādānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, paṭivedhādivisodhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa adhiṭṭhānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa vodānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, visesādhigamāya maggo ceva hetu ca, uttaripaṭivedhāya maggo ceva hetu ca, saccābhisamayāya maggo ceva hetu ca, nirodhe patiṭṭhāpanāya maggo ceva hetu ca.

ps1.9:2.1.pli: Abhiniropanaṭṭhena sammāsaṅkappo micchāsaṅkappassa pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, sahajātānaṁ dhammānaṁ upatthambhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, kilesānaṁ pariyādānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, paṭivedhādivisodhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa adhiṭṭhānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa vodānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, visesādhigamāya maggo ceva hetu ca, uttaripaṭivedhāya maggo ceva hetu ca, saccābhisamayāya maggo ceva hetu ca, nirodhe patiṭṭhāpanāya maggo ceva hetu ca.

ps1.9:3.1.pli: Pariggahaṭṭhena sammāvācā micchāvācāya pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, sahajātānaṁ dhammānaṁ upatthambhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, kilesānaṁ pariyādānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, paṭivedhādivisodhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa adhiṭṭhānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa vodānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, visesādhigamāya maggo ceva hetu ca, uttaripaṭivedhāya maggo ceva hetu ca, saccābhisamayāya maggo ceva hetu ca, nirodhe patiṭṭhāpanāya maggo ceva hetu ca.

ps1.9:4.1.pli: Samuṭṭhānaṭṭhena sammākammanto micchākammantassa pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, sahajātānaṁ dhammānaṁ upatthambhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, kilesānaṁ pariyādānāya maggo ceva hetu ca paṭivedhādivisodhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa adhiṭṭhānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa vodānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, visesādhigamāya maggo ceva hetu ca, uttaripaṭivedhāya maggo ceva hetu ca, saccābhisamayāya maggo ceva hetu ca, nirodhe patiṭṭhāpanāya maggo ceva hetu ca.

ps1.9:5.1.pli: Vodānaṭṭhena sammāājīvo micchāājīvassa pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca …pe…

ps1.9:5.2.pli: paggahaṭṭhena sammāvāyāmo micchāvāyāmassa pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca …pe…

ps1.9:5.3.pli: upaṭṭhānaṭṭhena sammāsati micchāsatiyā pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca …pe…

ps1.9:5.4.pli: avikkhepaṭṭhena sammāsamādhi micchāsamādhissa pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, sahajātānaṁ dhammānaṁ upatthambhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, kilesānaṁ pariyādānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, paṭivedhādivisodhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa adhiṭṭhānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa vodānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, visesādhigamāya maggo ceva hetu ca, uttaripaṭivedhāya maggo ceva hetu ca, saccābhisamayāya maggo ceva hetu ca, nirodhe patiṭṭhāpanāya maggo ceva hetu ca.

ps1.9:6.2.pli: avikkhepaṭṭhena sammāsamādhi oḷārikassa kāmarāgasaññojanassa paṭighasaññojanassa oḷārikassa kāmarāgānusayassa paṭighānusayassa pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, sahajātānaṁ dhammānaṁ upatthambhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, kilesānaṁ pariyādānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, paṭivedhādivisodhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa adhiṭṭhānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa vodānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, visesādhigamāya maggo ceva hetu ca, uttaripaṭivedhāya maggo ceva hetu ca, saccābhisamayāya maggo ceva hetu ca, nirodhe patiṭṭhāpanāya maggo ceva hetu ca.

ps1.9:7.2.pli: avikkhepaṭṭhena sammāsamādhi anusahagatassa kāmarāgasaññojanassa paṭighasaññojanassa, anusahagatassa kāmarāgānusayassa paṭighānusayassa pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, sahajātānaṁ dhammānaṁ upatthambhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, kilesānaṁ pariyādānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, paṭivedhādivisodhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa adhiṭṭhānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa vodānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, visesādhigamāya maggo ceva hetu ca, uttaripaṭivedhāya maggo ceva hetu ca, saccābhisamayāya maggo ceva hetu ca, nirodhe patiṭṭhāpanāya maggo ceva hetu ca.

ps1.9:8.2.pli: avikkhepaṭṭhena sammāsamādhi rūparāgassa arūparāgassa mānassa uddhaccassa avijjāya, mānānusayassa bhavarāgānusayassa avijjānusayassa pahānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, sahajātānaṁ dhammānaṁ upatthambhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, kilesānaṁ pariyādānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, paṭivedhādivisodhanāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa adhiṭṭhānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, cittassa, vodānāya maggo ceva hetu ca, visesādhigamāya maggo ceva hetu ca, uttaripaṭivedhāya maggo ceva hetu ca, saccābhisamayāya maggo ceva, hetu ca, nirodhe patiṭṭhāpanāya maggo ceva hetu ca.

ps1.9:9.1.pli: Dassanamaggo sammādiṭṭhi, abhiniropanamaggo sammāsaṅkappo, pariggahamaggo sammāvācā, samuṭṭhānamaggo sammākammanto, vodānamaggo sammāājīvo, paggahamaggo sammāvāyāmo, upaṭṭhānamaggo sammāsati, avikkhepamaggo sammāsamādhi.

ps1.9:9.2.pli: Upaṭṭhānamaggo satisambojjhaṅgo, pavicayamaggo dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgo, paggahamaggo vīriyasambojjhaṅgo, pharaṇamaggo pītisambojjhaṅgo, upasamamaggo passaddhisambojjhaṅgo, avikkhepamaggo samādhisambojjhaṅgo, paṭisaṅkhānamaggo upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo.

ps1.9:10.1.pli: Assaddhiye akampiyamaggo saddhābalaṁ, kosajje akampiyamaggo vīriyabalaṁ, pamāde akampiyamaggo satibalaṁ, uddhacce akampiyamaggo samādhibalaṁ, avijjāya akampiyamaggo paññābalaṁ.

ps1.9:10.2.pli: Adhimokkhamaggo saddhindriyaṁ, paggahamaggo vīriyindriyaṁ, upaṭṭhānamaggo satindriyaṁ, avikkhepamaggo samādhindriyaṁ, dassanamaggo paññindriyaṁ.

ps1.9:11.1.pli: Ādhipateyyaṭṭhena indriyā maggo, akampiyaṭṭhena balā maggo, niyyānaṭṭhena bojjhaṅgā maggo, hetuṭṭhena maggaṅgā maggo, upaṭṭhānaṭṭhena satipaṭṭhānā maggo, padahanaṭṭhena sammappadhānā maggo, ijjhanaṭṭhena iddhipādā maggo, tathaṭṭhena saccāni maggo, avikkhepaṭṭhena samatho maggo, anupassanaṭṭhena vipassanā maggo, ekarasaṭṭhena samathavipassanā maggo, anativattanaṭṭhena yuganaddhā maggo, saṁvaraṭṭhena sīlavisuddhi maggo, avikkhepaṭṭhena cittavisuddhi maggo, dassanaṭṭhena diṭṭhivisuddhi maggo, muttaṭṭhena vimokkho maggo, paṭivedhaṭṭhena vijjā maggo, pariccāgaṭṭhena vimutti maggo, samucchedaṭṭhena khaye ñāṇaṁ maggo, chando mūlaṭṭhena maggo, manasikāro samuṭṭhānaṭṭhena maggo, phasso samodhānaṭṭhena maggo, vedanā samosaraṇaṭṭhena maggo, samādhi pamukhaṭṭhena maggo, sati ādhipateyyaṭṭhena maggo, paññā taduttaraṭṭhena maggo, vimutti sāraṭṭhena maggo, amatogadhaṁ nibbānaṁ pariyosānaṭṭhena maggoti.
